homepage.heroSubline: Protecting your property with durable, expertly installed fences. Serving Kansas City and surrounding areas for over a decade.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Driven by Quality
aboutText: Lujan Fencing started with a simple mission: to provide Kansas City homeowners and businesses with fencing solutions built to last. We saw too many flimsy fences failing after a single harsh winter, and knew we could do better.

Our approach is straightforward. We use premium materials, proven techniques, and a dedicated team of skilled installers. We're not just building fences; we're building relationships with our clients, ensuring their satisfaction every step of the way.

We're proud to be a part of the Kansas City community. We support local initiatives and strive to contribute to the safety and beauty of our neighborhoods. When you choose Lujan Fencing, you're choosing a company that cares.

valueProps.title: Durable Materials
valueProps.description: We only use high-quality wood, vinyl, and metal to withstand Kansas City's weather extremes.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our experienced team ensures precise and secure fence installation, built to last for years.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: From classic to contemporary, we create custom fence designs tailored to your property and style.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Kansas City's soil conditions and building codes, ensuring compliance and longevity.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and discover the Lujan Fencing difference.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences providing privacy and natural beauty to your Kansas City property.
services.description:
Wood fences offer a timeless aesthetic and versatile design options for any Kansas City home. From traditional picket fences to privacy fences, we build custom wood fences using pressure-treated lumber to withstand the region's fluctuating temperatures and humidity. We understand the challenges of Kansas City's clay soil and ensure proper post setting and drainage to prevent warping and rot. Our wood fences are designed to enhance your property's curb appeal while providing security and privacy. 

We offer a variety of wood types, including cedar, pine, and redwood, each with its unique characteristics and benefits. Our expert team will guide you through the selection process, considering your budget and aesthetic preferences. We also provide staining and sealing services to protect your wood fence from the elements and prolong its lifespan. A well-maintained wood fence adds value and character to your home for years to come. 

Whether you're in Brookside or Northland, we'll craft a wood fence that complements your home's architecture and meets your specific needs. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial consultation to final inspection, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

faq.question: How long does a wood fence typically last in Kansas City?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a well-built wood fence can last 15-20 years in the Kansas City climate. Regular staining and sealing are crucial for preventing rot and weathering.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Kansas City?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine is a popular and cost-effective option, but cedar offers superior resistance to rot and insects. We can help you choose the best wood for your budget and needs.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a wood fence in Kansas City?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on your location and the height of the fence. We handle the permitting process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.

services.name: Vinyl Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences offering durability and a clean, modern look for your Kansas City property.
services.description:
Vinyl fences are an excellent choice for Kansas City homeowners seeking a durable, low-maintenance fencing solution. Unlike wood, vinyl fences won't rot, warp, or require painting, making them ideal for our region's fluctuating weather conditions. We install high-quality vinyl fences in a variety of styles, from traditional picket fences to privacy fences, all designed to withstand the elements and maintain their beauty for years to come.

Our vinyl fences are made from premium materials that are resistant to fading, cracking, and impact. We use advanced installation techniques to ensure a secure and long-lasting fence that will enhance your property's value and curb appeal. Whether you live in a historic home in Brookside or a newer development in Northland, we can create a vinyl fence that complements your home's architecture and meets your specific needs.

We understand the importance of proper installation, especially in Kansas City's clay soil. Our team takes extra care to ensure proper post setting and drainage to prevent shifting and settling. We also offer a variety of colors and textures to choose from, allowing you to customize your vinyl fence to match your personal style. With a vinyl fence from Lujan Fencing, you can enjoy a beautiful and secure property without the hassle of constant maintenance.

faq.question: How long does a vinyl fence last in Kansas City?
faq.answer: A properly installed vinyl fence can last 30 years or more in Kansas City, with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Will a vinyl fence fade in the Kansas City sun?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fences are made with UV inhibitors to prevent fading and discoloration, even in direct sunlight.

faq.question: Are vinyl fences more expensive than wood fences?
faq.answer: While the initial cost of a vinyl fence may be higher than a wood fence, the long-term cost is often lower due to reduced maintenance and longer lifespan.

services.name: Chain Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and secure chain link fences for residential and commercial properties in Kansas City.
services.description:
Chain link fences provide a cost-effective and reliable security solution for both residential and commercial properties in Kansas City. We install durable chain link fences in a variety of heights and gauges to meet your specific needs. Whether you're looking to secure your backyard, protect your business, or enclose a sports field, we have the expertise to deliver a high-quality chain link fence that will stand the test of time.

Our chain link fences are made from galvanized steel for superior rust resistance, ensuring long-lasting performance in Kansas City's challenging climate. We offer a variety of options, including black vinyl-coated chain link, which provides a more aesthetically pleasing look while still maintaining the strength and security of traditional chain link. We also offer privacy slats, which can be added to chain link fences to increase privacy and reduce visibility.

We understand the importance of proper installation, especially for commercial properties. Our team has extensive experience installing chain link fences for businesses throughout Kansas City, ensuring compliance with all local regulations and security requirements. We also offer gate installation and repair services to complete your chain link fence system. With a chain link fence from Lujan Fencing, you can enjoy peace of mind knowing that your property is secure and protected.

faq.question: How long does a chain link fence last in Kansas City?
faq.answer: A well-maintained chain link fence can last 20-30 years or more in Kansas City.

faq.question: What gauge chain link fence is best for security?
faq.answer: We recommend a heavier gauge chain link fence for increased security, especially for commercial properties.

faq.question: Can I add privacy to a chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer privacy slats in a variety of colors and materials to enhance the privacy of your chain link fence.

services.name: Ornamental Iron Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant and secure ornamental iron fences adding sophistication and security to Kansas City homes.
services.description:
Ornamental iron fences offer a blend of elegance and security, enhancing the curb appeal and value of your Kansas City home. We specialize in designing and installing custom ornamental iron fences that complement your home's architecture and reflect your personal style. From classic wrought iron designs to modern steel fences, we create stunning fences that provide both beauty and security.

Our ornamental iron fences are made from high-quality materials and are expertly crafted to withstand the elements. We offer a variety of finishes, including powder coating, which provides superior rust resistance and a durable, long-lasting finish. We also offer custom gate designs to complete your ornamental iron fence system. Whether you live in a historic home in Westport or a modern condo in the River Market, we can create an ornamental iron fence that enhances the beauty and security of your property.

We understand the importance of proper installation, especially for ornamental iron fences. Our team has extensive experience installing ornamental iron fences throughout Kansas City, ensuring precise and secure installation. We also offer repair and maintenance services to keep your ornamental iron fence looking its best for years to come. With an ornamental iron fence from Lujan Fencing, you can enjoy a beautiful and secure property that will be the envy of your neighbors.

faq.question: How long does an ornamental iron fence last in Kansas City?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, an ornamental iron fence can last for generations in Kansas City.

faq.question: What is the best finish for an ornamental iron fence?
faq.answer: Powder coating provides superior rust resistance and a durable, long-lasting finish for ornamental iron fences.

faq.question: Can I customize the design of my ornamental iron fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in designing custom ornamental iron fences that reflect your personal style and complement your home's architecture.

services.name: Fence Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable fence repair services for all types of fences in the Kansas City metro area.
services.description:
Lujan Fencing provides comprehensive fence repair services throughout the Kansas City metro area. We understand that fences can be damaged by severe weather, accidents, or simply wear and tear. Our experienced team can quickly diagnose and repair any type of fence, from wood and vinyl to chain link and ornamental iron. We offer prompt and reliable service to restore the security and beauty of your property.

We handle all types of fence repairs, including broken posts, damaged panels, sagging gates, and loose hardware. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that will withstand the elements. We also offer emergency fence repair services for situations where immediate action is required, such as after a storm or accident.

Whether you need a minor repair or a major overhaul, Lujan Fencing is here to help. We offer competitive pricing and a commitment to customer satisfaction. We'll work with you to assess the damage and provide a cost-effective solution that meets your needs. With our fence repair services, you can avoid the expense of replacing your entire fence and keep your property secure and looking its best.

faq.question: How much does fence repair cost in Kansas City?
faq.answer: The cost of fence repair varies depending on the type of damage and the materials required. We offer free estimates to assess the damage and provide a detailed quote.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for situations where immediate action is required.

faq.question: What types of fences do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of fences, including wood, vinyl, chain link, and ornamental iron.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gate solutions for residential and commercial properties in Kansas City.
services.description:
Lujan Fencing specializes in gate installation and repair services for both residential and commercial properties throughout Kansas City. A properly functioning gate is essential for security, convenience, and curb appeal. We offer a wide range of gate options, from simple walk-through gates to automated driveway gates, all designed to meet your specific needs and enhance the value of your property.

We install gates in a variety of materials, including wood, vinyl, chain link, and ornamental iron. Our experienced team will work with you to select the perfect gate style and material to complement your fence and enhance your property's overall aesthetic. We also offer custom gate designs to create a unique and personalized entrance to your property.

In addition to gate installation, we also provide comprehensive gate repair services. We can repair damaged gates, replace broken hardware, and adjust gate alignment to ensure smooth and reliable operation. We also offer gate opener repair and installation services for automated gates. Whether you need a new gate installed or an existing gate repaired, Lujan Fencing is here to help.

faq.question: How much does gate installation cost in Kansas City?
faq.answer: The cost of gate installation varies depending on the type of gate, the materials used, and the complexity of the installation. We offer free estimates to assess your needs and provide a detailed quote.

faq.question: Do you offer automated gate systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of automated gate systems for both residential and commercial properties.

faq.question: Can you repair my existing gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive gate repair services for all types of gates.

serviceAreas.content:
Lujan Fencing is proud to offer our expert fence installation and repair services to the residents of Overland Park, MO. Known for its established suburban neighborhoods dating back to the 1970s, 80s, and 90s, Overland Park presents unique fencing needs that we are well-equipped to handle. We understand the importance of maintaining the aesthetic appeal of your property while providing security and privacy for your family. 

Our team is experienced in working with a variety of fence styles suitable for the Overland Park landscape, from classic wood fences to durable vinyl and chain-link options. We are also mindful of the region's climate, particularly the cold winters and potential for ice storms, ensuring that your fence is built to withstand the elements and provide lasting value. We are committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and customer service to every homeowner in Overland Park. We also offer fence repair services to address any damage caused by storms or general wear and tear.
serviceAreas.localContext: Overland Park is a large suburban city known for its excellent schools, family-friendly atmosphere, and well-maintained properties, including many homes with large yards perfect for fencing.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Lujan Fencing did an amazing job installing our new wood privacy fence. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic. They really understood the challenges with our sloping yard in Waldo and built a fence that looks great and provides the privacy we wanted. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We needed a chain link fence installed quickly for our commercial property near Union Station. Lujan Fencing provided a competitive quote and completed the job on time and within budget. The fence is sturdy and secure, just what we needed.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: We chose Lujan Fencing to install a vinyl fence around our pool in Overland Park. They were very helpful in choosing the right style and color to match our house. The installation was smooth and the fence looks beautiful. We're very happy with the results!

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: After a bad ice storm, our wood fence had several broken posts. Lujan Fencing came out quickly and repaired the fence efficiently and professionally. Their prices were fair and they saved us from having to replace the entire fence.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: Lujan Fencing installed a beautiful ornamental iron fence around our front yard in Brookside. It really adds to the curb appeal of our home. There were a few minor issues during installation, but they were quick to address them and ensure our satisfaction.

reviews.name: Brian L.
reviews.text: Our driveway gate was malfunctioning and Lujan Fencing was able to diagnose and repair it quickly. They were knowledgeable, professional, and their prices were reasonable. We highly recommend their gate repair services.
